productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Solid Grey Trouser
description: Composition Grey trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, two side pockets, two covered back pockets with button closures, comfortable waist with belt loops and a zipper and button closure on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not bleach or wring by hand Dry in shade Warm iron Take formal dressing to the next level with this pair of trousers from mark taylor. The fall of the fabric gives a slim shape while offering all day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal shirt, a blazer, stylish cufflinks and leather shoes.
